name: rails-sidekiq
given: A Rails 8 application with Puma, SQLite, and Sidekiq for background jobs, no existing monitoring
prompt: Set up Sentry for this Rails application with full monitoring including background jobs. Use the SENTRY_DSN environment variable.

soft_assertions.criterion: The agent detected Sidekiq in the project and recommended sentry-sidekiq
The agent detected Rails as the framework and chose sentry-rails
